summary: Presentation The Ayto 2026 pushes all the big air parameters to the top. 100% performance, this exceptional kite is aimed at the most demanding and committed riders. Presentation The new Vertigo has changed dimensions. TheVertigo boosts all programs. Designed for twin tip, it has the glide and maneuverability that we love in many aspects of kitesurfing. We keep the light, fluid, easy-to-live-with 3-strut design, but everything else has been pushed further: higher ratio, very…

Presentation The Display is our most accessible , reliable and most predictable kite. What we love about this kite is that it does everything well. Very stable , you feel relaxed with the kite at its zenith. Low aspect ratio, it's easy to relaunch. Powerful, you don't need to overpower to have fun. Great depower, you…

Presentation The Elips is our high-performance wave kite for committed surfing , strapless tricks and enjoying a lively and light kite in kitefoil. This surf kite paradoxically draws its DNA from our big air developments: we have taken the best of what is in terms of tension, surface centering, arc opening, rotation…

Presentation For years GONG has held a unique concept of extremely lightweight kite with optional fiberglass struts: the Strutless. An ultra-light inflatable kite without struts , designed for pure gliding, performance and stability in very light winds so you never have to stay on the beach waiting for the wind. The…

Presentation The Unik 2026 takes a real leap forward: increased ratio, more open arc, recentered surface, refined tips and new 6-point bridle without pulleys. Lightweight with its single strut structure , the 2026 Unik Perf Series is suitable for all levels for all lightwind, underpowered, foil , surf or twin tip…

Presentation The Sizzle Carbon Pro is the shape of choice for Freestyle/Wakestyle with a super high-end construction for one of the most committed disciplines in kiting. Presentation Super easy, veeeeeery comfortable, the Sway puts you in a good place from the get-go. It offers perfect grip to make upwind edging easier. Presentation The Rumble was developed for modern, condensed, and explosive freestyle kitefoil sessions.
